description.ko: 빛과 형태가 연속적이고 유연한 움직임으로 어우러져 자연의 리듬과 조화를 이루는 AURA-7의 모습을 시각적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A stunning visual exploration of AURA-7 as it harmonizes with natural rhythms, featuring seamless transitions of light and form in a continuous, fluid dance.

prompt: Cinematic 8k rendering of AURA-7, core surrounded by swirling bioluminescent ribbons, organic fluid shapes, soft gradients of teal and gold, ethereal atmosphere, liquid metal textures merging with biological curves, macro photography style, deep bokeh background, flowing energy patterns.
